design_philosophy.visual_style: Dark mode with metallic gold accents, deep burgundy highlights, and paper-like textures. High contrast typography.

variants.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-black hover:bg-[#C5A059] rounded-sm uppercase tracking-widest font-bold px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-300 shadow-[0_4px_14px_0_rgba(212,175,55,0.39)] hover:shadow-[0_6px_20px_rgba(212,175,55,0.23)] hover:-translate-y-1
variants.outline: bg-transparent border border-[#D4AF37] text-[#D4AF37] hover:bg-[#D4AF37] hover:text-black rounded-sm uppercase tracking-widest px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-300

Card.base: bg-[#18181B] border border-[#2E2E30] hover:border-[#D4AF37]/50 transition-colors duration-300 rounded-sm overflow-hidden
Card.interactive: cursor-pointer hover:shadow-xl hover:shadow-black/50 hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300

Input.base: bg-transparent border-b border-[#2E2E30] focus:border-[#D4AF37] rounded-none px-0 py-3 text-lg placeholder:text-gray-600 focus:ring-0 focus:outline-none transition-colors

Badge.base: bg-[#800020] text-white px-3 py-1 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-full

hero.structure: Full-screen distinct section (h-screen or min-h-[90vh]). Centered content. Heavy use of dark overlay (bg-black/60) to ensure text readability over images.

menu_grid.structure: Masonry or Grid layout. Categories sticky on mobile. Cards for items.
menu_grid.item_style: Name (Serif) ...... dots ...... Price (Gold). Description below in muted sans-serif.

assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react' but with stroke-width={1.5} for elegance. Prefer 'phosphor-icons' (Light/Thin weight) if possible for a more premium look.

motion.page_transition: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -20 }} transition={{ duration: 0.5, ease: 'easeOut' }}
motion.stagger_children: variants={{ hidden: { opacity: 0 }, show: { opacity: 1, transition: { staggerChildren: 0.1 } } }}

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure Gold (#D4AF37) is used on Dark Backgrounds (#0F0F10) for non-text components. For text, ensure it's large enough or use a lighter shade.
accessibility.interactive_areas: Min 44px touch targets for all mobile ordering buttons.

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds, use solid dark colors or subtle noise textures.
Do not center align large blocks of text; only headings.
Use 2x more padding than usual. Luxury = Space.
Never use default blue/standard link colors. Use Gold or White.
All interactive elements must have a `data-testid` attribute.
implementation_steps: Install fonts: Playfair Display and Manrope from Google Fonts.
Configure Tailwind theme with the custom color palette.
Create a 'Layout' component that handles the Navbar (with Language Switcher) and Footer.
Build the Menu Page with category filtering.
Integrate Stripe (mock or test mode) for checkout.
